title: eriosema afzelii
intro: Eriosema afzelii, also known as the African milkpea or False Cowpea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eriosema afzelii include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its role in promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Eriosema afzelii are made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a tea or decoction for medicinal use.
